ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Click here to view this panorama in an alternative viewer.
ast.target: 点击此处使用其他查看器查看此全景图。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Your browser does not support WebGL.
ast.target: 您的浏览器不支持 WebGL。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 请输入您的凭据以进行连接。

ast.source: Bragi video editor: clip export failed
ast.target: Bragi 视频编辑器：片段导出失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Bragi Canvas: failed to save update reminder state
ast.target: Bragi Canvas：保存更新提醒状态失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: Bragi MCP 服务器停止失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Bragi Canvas: failed to persist pending tasks
ast.target: Bragi Canvas：持久化待处理任务失败

ast.name: log
ast.source: Reducing canvas size due to error 1286!
ast.target: 由于错误 1286，正在减小画布尺寸！

ast.name: log
ast.target: 错误：指定了无效的图像类型！

ast.name: log
ast.target: 错误：未检测到 WebGL 支持！

ast.name: log
ast.source: Error: Something went wrong with WebGL!

ast.name: log
ast.source: HFOV bounds do not make sense (minHfov > maxHfov).

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已从链接中移除数据 URI。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete bragi-generated files that are indexed for the active canvas but no longer used there
ast.target: 删除为活动画布索引但不再使用的 Bragi 生成文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a data.json file. If it looks valid, you can replace your current settings.
ast.target: 选择一个 data.json 文件。如果文件有效，您可以替换当前设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow clients to control canvas operations through the mcp protocol
ast.target: 允许客户端通过 MCP 协议控制画布操作

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Localhost port for mcp server (requires restart)
ast.target: MCP 服务器的本地主机端口（需要重启）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. When set, clients must send "Authorization: Bearer <token>" on every request. Leave blank for open localhost access.
ast.target: 可选。设置后，客户端必须在每个请求中发送 \"Authorization: Bearer <token>\"。留空表示开放本地主机访问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Briefly hosts your files so model apis can fetch them. Auto-deleted after 24h.
ast.target: 临时托管您的文件，以便模型 API 可以获取它们。24 小时后自动删除。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: These models will be removed because no other configured provider supports them:
ast.target: 以下模型将被移除，因为没有其他已配置的提供商支持它们：

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 设置 Seedance 资产 ID

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请尝试使用键值对数组代替。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Import failed. No settings were changed.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No generated files yet — nothing to clean
ast.target: 尚无生成的文件——无需清理

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No indexed generated files for this canvas yet
ast.target: 此画布尚无已索引的生成文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Everything indexed for this canvas is in use
ast.target: 此画布所有已索引的文件均在使用中

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least two image nodes
ast.target: 请至少选择两个图像节点

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only image nodes can be composed
ast.target: 仅图像节点可进行合成

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This node has no image file

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bragi canvas: no models available. Add models in settings.
ast.target: Bragi 画布：无可用模型。请在设置中添加模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bragi canvas: no prompt found in this node
ast.target: Bragi 画布：此节点中未找到提示词

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先选择一个图像节点

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clip export is not supported in this environment
ast.target: 此环境不支持导出剪辑

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先选择一个视频节点

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bragi canvas is up to date
ast.target: Bragi 画布已是最新版本

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可用于生成的提示词

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Video queued — you'll get a notice when it's ready
ast.target: 视频已排队——就绪后您将收到通知

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Add your fal.ai key in settings to use this
ast.target: 请在设置中添加您的 fal.ai 密钥以使用此功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sunny, positive, friendly, and natural young woman
ast.target: 阳光、积极、友好且自然的年轻女性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard Mandarin with a slight northern accent
ast.target: 标准普通话，略带北方口音

ast.name: description
ast.target: 自信、可爱，略带一丝倔强

ast.name: description
ast.source: A blend of intellect and gentleness

ast.name: description
ast.source: Designer who cannot pronounce retroflex sounds
ast.target: 无法发出翘舌音的设计师

ast.name: description
ast.source: Premium cinematic American English female voice
ast.target: 高级电影质感美式英语女声

ast.name: description
ast.target: 富有节奏感、戏剧性、生动且有力

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mature woman voice with memorable rhythm
ast.target: 节奏感令人难忘的成熟女性嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful clear voice for character performance
ast.target: 用于角色表演的清晰有力嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.target: 沙哑、烟熏质感的英雄嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.target: 朴实的乡村故事讲述嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.target: 冷冽中带着温暖的俄式风味嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.target: 理性且叛逆的德国青年

ast.name: description
ast.source: Magnetic, natural, and steady male voice
ast.target: 富有磁性、自然且沉稳的男性嗓音

ast.name: description
ast.source: Young man raised in Beijing hutongs
ast.target: 在北京胡同长大的年轻人

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all nodes on the active canvas
ast.target: 列出活动画布上的所有节点

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get details of a single node including its edges
ast.target: 获取单个节点的详细信息，包括其连接边

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new text node on the canvas
ast.target: 在画布上创建一个新的文本节点

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update a node's content, position, or size
ast.target: 更新节点的内容、位置或大小

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete a node from the canvas
ast.target: 从画布上删除一个节点

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an edge between two nodes
ast.target: 在两个节点之间创建一条边

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete an edge from the canvas

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all edges on the active canvas
ast.target: 列出活动画布上的所有边

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a node on the canvas
ast.target: 在画布上选择一个节点

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full canvas data (all nodes and edges). Returns a truncated marker if the JSON exceeds 100KB — use list_nodes / list_edges for large canvases.
ast.target: 读取完整的画布数据（所有节点和边）。如果 JSON 超过 100KB，将返回截断标记——对于大型画布，请使用 list_nodes / list_edges。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List enabled AI models, optionally filtered by type (image/video/text/audio). Only returns models with a connected, configured provider.
ast.target: 列出已启用的 AI 模型，可按类型（图像/视频/文本/音频）筛选。仅返回已连接并配置好提供者的模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get upstream inputs (text prompts, reference images, reference videos, audio files, and PDFs) connected to a node via arrows
ast.target: 获取通过箭头连接到节点的上游输入（文本提示、参考图像、参考视频、音频文件和 PDF）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trigger AI generation on a node. The node must contain a text prompt (text node or .md file node). Upstream connected nodes provide reference images/text. Returns immediately for sync results (image/text) or with a task status for async results (video).
ast.target: 在节点上触发 AI 生成。该节点必须包含文本提示（文本节点或 .md 文件节点）。上游连接的节点提供参考图像/文本。对于同步结果（图像/文本）立即返回，对于异步结果（视频）则返回任务状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all pending async generation tasks (currently only video tasks are tracked). Empty array means no in-flight async work.
ast.target: 列出所有待处理的异步生成任务（目前仅跟踪视频任务）。空数组表示没有进行中的异步工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create multiple text nodes in a single canvas import. Much faster than calling create_text_node N times.
ast.target: 在单次画布导入中创建多个文本节点。比调用 N 次 create_text_node 快得多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create multiple edges in a single canvas import.
ast.target: 在单次画布导入中创建多条边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update geometry and/or color of many nodes in a single canvas import. Much faster than calling update_node N times. Use this for layout/cleanup passes on large canvases.
ast.target: 在单次画布导入中更新多个节点的几何形状和/或颜色。比调用 N 次 update_node 快得多。用于对大型画布进行布局/清理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a group node (a labelled rectangular frame around a region of the canvas). Use this to visually partition a cluttered canvas into chapters / scenes / stages.
ast.target: 创建一个组节点（画布上某个区域周围的带标签矩形框架）。用于将杂乱的画布视觉划分为章节/场景/阶段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lay out the given nodes in a grid. Preserves each node's current width/height; only moves x/y. Typical cleanup call for a cluttered canvas.
ast.target: 将给定节点排列成网格。保留每个节点当前的宽度/高度；仅移动 x/y 坐标。通常用于清理杂乱的画布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a file node on the canvas referencing an existing vault file (image/video/audio/md).
ast.target: 在画布上创建一个文件节点，引用一个已存在的保险库文件（图像/视频/音频/md）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write a base64-encoded image to the canvas's output directory (_bragi/assets by default) and create a file node for it.
ast.target: 将 base64 编码的图像写入画布的输出目录（默认为 _bragi/assets）并为其创建一个文件节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bind a provider-specific Seedance Asset ID to an image file node. Used for face-reference asset://<id> protocol. Pass empty string to clear.
ast.target: 将特定于提供者的 Seedance 资产 ID 绑定到图像文件节点。用于 face-reference asset://<id> 协议。传入空字符串以清除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get path and stats for the currently active canvas (or null if no canvas is open).
ast.target: 获取当前活动画布的路径和统计信息（如果没有打开画布则返回 null）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List canvas files Bragi has seen in this vault.
ast.target: 列出 Bragi 在此保险库中已见过的画布文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Switch the active tab to the given .canvas file. Requires user confirmation via a modal; throws "cancelled by user" if the user declines.
ast.target: 将活动标签页切换到给定的 .canvas 文件。需要用户通过模态框确认；如果用户拒绝，则抛出“cancelled by user”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get status of an async task by taskId. Returns "pending" if still in-flight, or "not_found" if already completed/failed (inspect the placeholder node to see the result).
ast.target: 通过 taskId 获取异步任务的状态。如果仍在进行中则返回“pending”，如果已完成/失败则返回“not_found”（检查占位节点以查看结果）。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Canvas too large to return in full. Use list_nodes / list_edges / get_node instead.
ast.target: 画布过大，无法完整返回。请改用 list_nodes / list_edges / get_node。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已连接（密钥有作用域限制，但有效）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Token OK but no healthy Luma accounts upstream.
ast.target: 令牌有效，但上游没有健康的 Luma 账户。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 导入 .bragi 包（合并到当前画布）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 导入 .bragi 包（作为新画布）

ast.name: text
ast.source: All supported providers are already added.
ast.target: 所有支持的提供商均已添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick a provider that supports this model and add its credentials.
ast.target: 选择一个支持此模型的提供商并添加其凭据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This provider does not support any catalog models yet.
ast.target: 此提供商目前不支持任何目录模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These models use this provider now. They will keep working by switching to another connected provider:
ast.target: 这些模型当前使用此提供商。它们将通过切换到另一个已连接的提供商继续工作：

ast.name: text
ast.source: These models use this provider now and have no other connected provider, so they will disappear from the model list:
ast.target: 这些模型当前使用此提供商且没有其他已连接的提供商，因此它们将从模型列表中消失：

ast.name: text
ast.source: These models will keep working but switch provider:
ast.target: 这些模型将继续工作，但会切换提供商：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This does not look like a settings file. Please choose data.json from a plugin folder.
ast.target: 这看起来不像一个设置文件。请选择插件文件夹中的 data.json。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will replace your current settings, including providers, model list, model order, and local server options.
ast.target: 这将替换您当前的设置，包括提供商、模型列表、模型顺序和本地服务器选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This can't be undone. Only import a file from someone you trust because it can include API keys.
ast.target: 此操作无法撤销。仅导入您信任的文件，因为它可能包含 API 密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: We can move them into a single hidden folder so your vault stays clean. Your canvases will keep working — references are updated automatically, and a backup is saved first.
ast.target: 我们可以将它们移动到一个单独的隐藏文件夹中，以保持您的库整洁。您的画布将继续正常工作——引用会自动更新，并且会先保存备份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bragi canvas relies on Obsidian being in english. Please switch Obsidian to english or english (gb), then restart Obsidian.
ast.target: Bragi 画布依赖于 Obsidian 处于英文环境。请将 Obsidian 切换为英文或英文（英国），然后重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click Update, then use Obsidian's Community Plugins update flow if prompted.
ast.target: 点击更新，然后在提示时使用 Obsidian 的社区插件更新流程。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Asset ids are provider-specific. The same image can have separate tokenrouter, byteplus, and volcengine ids.
ast.target: 资源 ID 是特定于提供商的。同一张图片可能拥有独立的 tokenrouter、byteplus 和 volcengine ID。
